title: CBRE Group (CBRE) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: CBRE Group (CBRE) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.72 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.65 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.13 per share a year ago.

title: MainStay CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (NYSE: MEGI) Declares Monthly Distribution for October 2023 and Availability of 19(a) Notice
text: NEW YORK , Oct. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MainStay CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (the "Fund") (NYSE: MEGI) today announced the Fund's monthly distributions for October 2023 of $0.1250 per common share. The Fund's current annualized distribution rate is 13.16% based upon the closing price of $11.40 on October 11, 2023, and 11.00% based upon the Fund's closing NAV of $13.64 as of the same date.

title: CBRE Group, Inc. Announces Details of Conference Call and Webcast for Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE: CBRE) will release its third quarter 2023 financial results at approximately 6:55 a.m. Eastern time on Friday, October 27, 2023. Management will hold a conference call to discuss these results at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time on that same day (Friday, October 27, 2023).
